rules.rule_text:
title: Executable Deployment from Remote Share
id: 85f915d8-7cbc-4bd5-b1cc-03c7f3188c19
status: experimental
description: Detects use of the copy utility to deploy executable files from a remote
  share to a temp directory, such as the procedure performed by Vice Ransomware gang.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/25/dev-0832-vice-society-opportunistic-ransomware-campaigns-impacting-us-education-sector/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/26
tags:
- attack.lateral_movement
- attack.command_and_control
- attack.t1105
- attack.t1021
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains|windash: /c
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - copy
    - exe
    - c$
    - \\\\
    CommandLine|contains:
    - temp
    - tmp
    CommandLine|re: .*(?:[0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}.*
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
